runz.hero.title: RUNZ
runz.hero.lead: A roguelite arena shooter where you roll for bullets to build your magazine.
runz.overview.title: Assemble the perfect magazine.
runz.overview.p1: Survive twenty rounds. Between each one, shop for bullets to draft your perfect magazine.  Manage your economy, buy crazy mods, enchant your magazine slots,  carefully place the bullets  in your magazine and let your build loose on your enemies.
runz.overview.feature.0: 20-round survival (planned endless and progression in the full game)
runz.overview.feature.2: Collect 3 copies of the same bullet to upgrade it
runz.overview.feature.3: Enchant slots to make any bullet inherit a new synergy
runz.overview.feature.4: Mods that can radically change how you approach your run
runz.facts.title: Quick Facts
runz.facts.spec.4.dd: Steam: Windows, macOS, Linux. itch.io: HTML5, Windows, macOS, Linux.
runz.facts.spec.6.dd: Public demo available. Full game coming soon.
runz.media.title: Screenshots
runz.creators.title: Creator Notes
runz.creators.col.0.p0: Creators may stream, record, clip, review, and monetize RUNZ gameplay videos.
runz.creators.col.0.p1: No embargo is active unless we state one directly in writing.
runz.creators.col.1.p0: Build a magazine, draft a bullet "team", ala auto-"battler X twin stick shooter X deck building".
runz.creators.col.2.p0: If you receive a free key or early build, please disclose that connection according to your platform and local rules.
runz.downloads.title: Downloads
runz.downloads.kit.p: The ZIP bundles the RUNZ icon, splash image, demo badge, and a full set of high-res screenshots.
runz.downloads.kit.li.2: Steam, itch.io, Discord, YouTube, and TikTok links
runz.downloads.kit.li.3: Copy-paste pitch, facts, and Steam page links
runz.downloads.copy.0.label: One Sentence
runz.downloads.copy.0.text: RUNZ is a top-down roguelite arena shooter where every bullet in your magazine matters.
runz.downloads.copy.1.label: Short Description
runz.downloads.copy.1.text: Blast through escalating waves of enemies and build the best magazine ever created. Collect cash, survive, then hit the shop between rounds to buy bullets and rebuild your magazine into a ridiculous combo engine. Stack synergies, upgrade your bullets, and snowball into a screen-filling bullet storm.
runz.footer.meta: Last updated June 24, 2026 · RUNZ is developed and published by sardin-ventures.

ohjata.hero.title: OHJATA
ohjata.hero.lead: Redirect your weapon and collect upgrades to break the game and find its secrets
ohjata.overview.title: A redirect-first roguelite.
ohjata.overview.p1: Ohjata is an action-roguelite game built around a unique redirect mechanic: steer your projectile through the arena instead of just firing it.
ohjata.overview.p2: Collect upgrades that synergizes, and explore a hand-crafted map each attempt.
ohjata.features.title: Steam Features
ohjata.features.col.0.p: Master the weapon redirect mechanic, improve it during a run, and avoid losing the projectile to walls or off-screen reloads.
ohjata.features.col.1.p: Level-up choices can reshape a build through weapon upgrades, stat buffs, synergies, random events, and relics.
ohjata.features.col.2.p: Use crazy run modifiers to push your runs further.
ohjata.features.col.3.p: Explore a hand-crafted map, push through harder eras, solve puzzles, read lore, and search for secret bosses.
ohjata.media.title: Screenshots
ohjata.footer.meta: Last updated June 24, 2026 · Ohjata is developed and published by sardin-ventures.
